summary: Comprehensive testing of KBS Bridge Management System completed. Backend APIs 100% functional (21/21 tests passed). Frontend core functionality working well with some navigation targeting issues in Turkish UI.

ui_bugs.issue: Inconsistent navigation targeting for Turkish menu items - timeouts on 'Gönderimler', 'Denetim İzi', 'Agent İzleme'
Hotel selection dropdown targeting inconsistent - timeout on selection
Language toggle may not fully translate all elements (shows 'KBS Bridge' instead of full title)

action_item_for_main_agent: Minor navigation targeting issues in Turkish UI - consider improving selectors or adding more specific data-testids for menu items. All core functionality working well.
